entry.title: 4 Teams That Could Shape The MLB Trade Deadline
entry.summary:
Who should buy, who should sell, and who should stand pat at the MLB Trade Deadline? Alanna Rizzo, Todd Frazier and Erik Kratz play a game of "Wheeling and Dealing," breaking down the Mets, Blue Jays, Padres and Tigers while debating the biggest decisions each team faces before the deadline. Plus, the crew discusses potential trade targets, whether Tarik Skubal should be moved, and what could shape the market over the next two weeks.
Use our code for 10% off your next order of MLB tickets on SeatGeek*: https://seatgeek.onelink.me/RrnK/TERRITORY10 Sponsored by SeatGeek. *Restrictions apply. Max $20 discount
Subscribe to the podcast! https://apple.co/3KWKFNo https://open.spotify.com/show/4NCHAElLW0pR2sclRnqj0V
Follow all our social media channels for more content! https://twitter.com/FoulTerritoryTV https://www.instagram.com/foulterritoryshow/ https://www.tiktok.com/@foulterritory https://www.facebook.com/FoulTerritoryShow
entry.content:
Who should buy, who should sell, and who should stand pat at the MLB Trade Deadline? Alanna Rizzo, Todd Frazier and Erik Kratz play a game of "Wheeling and Dealing," breaking down the Mets, Blue Jays, Padres and Tigers while debating the biggest decisions each team faces before the deadline. Plus, the crew discusses potential trade targets, whether Tarik Skubal should be moved, and what could shape the market over the next two weeks.

entry.title: Ken Rosenthal Breaks Down The Hottest MLB Trade Rumors Ahead Of The Deadline
entry.summary:
FT Senior Insider Ken Rosenthal joins Alanna Rizzo, Todd Frazier and Erik Kratz to break down the biggest storylines shaping the MLB Trade Deadline. We discuss Francisco Lindor, the Giants' biggest trade questions, the Braves' deadline priorities, Tarik Skubal's future, and which contenders could make the biggest moves before the deadline.
Use our code for 10% off your next order of MLB tickets on SeatGeek*: https://seatgeek.onelink.me/RrnK/TERRITORY10 Sponsored by SeatGeek. *Restrictions apply. Max $20 discount

entry.content:
FT Senior Insider Ken Rosenthal joins Alanna Rizzo, Todd Frazier and Erik Kratz to break down the biggest storylines shaping the MLB Trade Deadline. We discuss Francisco Lindor, the Giants' biggest trade questions, the Braves' deadline priorities, Tarik Skubal's future, and which contenders could make the biggest moves before the deadline.

entry.title: Phillies Trade Deadline Plans Just Changed
entry.summary:
The Phillies suffered a major blow with the loss of Brad Keller for the rest of the season, creating an even bigger need ahead of the MLB Trade Deadline. Alanna Rizzo, Todd Frazier and Erik Kratz discuss how Keller's injury changes Dave Dombrowski's deadline priorities, whether Philadelphia should prioritize bullpen help over a right-handed bat, and which trade targets could help the Phillies make another postseason run.
Use our code for 10% off your next order of MLB tickets on SeatGeek*: https://seatgeek.onelink.me/RrnK/TERRITORY10 Sponsored by SeatGeek. *Restrictions apply. Max $20 discount

Follow all our social media channels for more content! https://twitter.com/FoulTerritoryTV https://www.instagram.com/foulterritoryshow/ https://www.tiktok.com/@foulterritory https://www.facebook.com/FoulTerritoryShow
entry.content:

entry.title: How Aggressive Should The White Sox Be At The Trade Deadline?
entry.summary:
James Fegan of Sox Machine joins Erik Kratz, Kevin Pillar and Scott Braun following the announcement that Sox Machine is officially joining the Foul Territory Network! We discuss the surprising first-place White Sox, why Chicago's turnaround happened sooner than expected, and what the club should do at the trade deadline. Plus, James breaks down the White Sox's biggest roster needs, whether Reid Detmers is a realistic trade target, and which young players could become the foundation of the franchise for years to come.
Use our code for 10% off your next order of MLB tickets on SeatGeek*: https://seatgeek.onelink.me/RrnK/TERRITORY10 Sponsored by SeatGeek. *Restrictions apply. Max $20 discount

Follow all our social media channels for more content! https://twitter.com/FoulTerritoryTV https://www.instagram.com/foulterritoryshow/ https://www.tiktok.com/@foulterritory https://www.facebook.com/FoulTerritoryShow

entry.title: MLB Insider Robert Murray Shares The Latest Trade Deadline Buzz
entry.summary:
MLB insider Robert Murray of FanSided joins Erik Kratz, Kevin Pillar and Scott Braun to break down the latest trade deadline buzz around baseball. We discuss the Padres' plans with Mason Miller, the Brewers' trade for Lance McCullers Jr., which teams could become the biggest buyers and sellers, and why Tarik Skubal could still be the biggest name to watch before the deadline. Plus, Robert shares the latest on the Phillies' trade targets, the White Sox's surprising position as buyers, and a few under-the-radar players who could end up on the move.
Use our code for 10% off your next order of MLB tickets on SeatGeek*: https://seatgeek.onelink.me/RrnK/TERRITORY10 Sponsored by SeatGeek. *Restrictions apply. Max $20 discount
0:00 Mason Miller 1:55 Lance McCullers to Brewers 4:00 Giants 7:50 White Sox & Reid Detmers 11:53 Jung Hoo Lee 14:25 Freddy Peralta 15:15 Is parody good for the deadline? 17:00 GM’s treating it different 18:05 Phillies 20:00 Robert’s new subtext

Follow all our social media channels for more content! https://twitter.com/FoulTerritoryTV https://www.instagram.com/foulterritoryshow/ https://www.tiktok.com/@foulterritory https://www.facebook.com/FoulTerritoryShow

Plus, Robert shares the latest on the Phillies' trade targets, the White Sox's surprising position as buyers, and a few under-the-radar players who could end up on the move.

entry.title: BREAKING: Reds Lock Up Chase Burns Long-Term
entry.summary:
Erik Kratz, Kevin Pillar and Scott Braun break down Chase Burns' seven-year extension with the Reds and what it means for both sides. We discuss why more young pitchers are choosing long-term security over free agency, how Cincinnati has built one of baseball's best young rotations, and why the organization's investment in pitching development is paying off. Plus, we explain why this deal could become a blueprint for small-market teams moving forward.
Use our code for 10% off your next order of MLB tickets on SeatGeek*: https://seatgeek.onelink.me/RrnK/TERRITORY10 Sponsored by SeatGeek. *Restrictions apply. Max $20 discount

Follow all our social media channels for more content! https://twitter.com/FoulTerritoryTV https://www.instagram.com/foulterritoryshow/ https://www.tiktok.com/@foulterritory https://www.facebook.com/FoulTerritoryShow
entry.content:

We discuss why more young pitchers are choosing long-term security over free agency, how Cincinnati has built one of baseball's best young rotations, and why the organization's investment in pitching development is paying off. Plus, we explain why this deal could become a blueprint for small-market teams moving forward.

entry.title: These MLB Teams Changed Our Expectations For The Second Half
entry.summary:
A.J. Pierzynski, Erik Kratz and Scott Braun discuss the biggest surprises heading into the second half of the MLB season. They break down the Red Sox incredible turnaround, debate whether Boston should be buyers at the trade deadline, and explain what's gone wrong for the Athletics after their stunning collapse. Plus, the guys share their thoughts on the first-place White Sox, the Cubs playoff chances, and several under-the-radar teams that could make noise after the All-Star break.
Use our code for 10% off your next order of MLB tickets on SeatGeek*: https://seatgeek.onelink.me/RrnK/TERRITORY10 Sponsored by SeatGeek. *Restrictions apply. Max $20 discount

entry.content:
A.J. Pierzynski, Erik Kratz and Scott Braun discuss the biggest surprises heading into the second half of the MLB season. They break down the Red Sox incredible turnaround, debate whether Boston should be buyers at the trade deadline, and explain what's gone wrong for the Athletics after their stunning collapse. Plus, the guys share their thoughts on the first-place White Sox, the Cubs playoff chances, and several under-the-radar teams that could make noise after the All-Star break.

entry.title: Cole Hamels On The 2008 Phillies, Zack Wheeler & This Year's World Series Hopes
entry.summary:
Former MLB All-Star Cole Hamels joins A.J. Pierzynski, Erik Kratz and Scott Braun live from Philadelphia during MLB All-Star Week! Hamels reflects on the 2008 Phillies, explains why he still roots for the franchise, and shares behind-the-scenes stories from one of the greatest rotations in baseball. Plus, he weighs in on Zack Wheeler's All-Star snub, discusses how starting pitchers should be developed in today's game, and looks back on some unforgettable moments from his Phillies career.
Use our code for 10% off your next order of MLB tickets on SeatGeek*: https://seatgeek.onelink.me/RrnK/TERRITORY10 Sponsored by SeatGeek. *Restrictions apply. Max $20 discount​

entry.title: MLB All-Star Red Carpet Interviews | Paul Skenes, Bryce Harper, Munetaka Murakami & More
entry.summary:
Alanna Rizzo and Tricia Whitaker catch up with some of baseball's biggest stars from the MLB All-Star Game red carpet in Philadelphia! Paul Skenes, Livvy Dunne, Munetaka Murakami, Bryce Harper, Juan Soto, Dave Roberts, Freddie Freeman, Max Muncy, Ozzie Albies, Drake Baldwin, Oli Marmol and CJ Abrams stop by to discuss All-Star Week, the Home Run Derby, memorable moments from the first half, and what they're looking forward to during the Midsummer Classic.
0:00 Paul Skenes 1:17 Bryce Harper 2:32 Murakami 3:48 Juan Soto 4:41 Dave Roberts 5:32 Freddie Freeman 6:50 Max Muncy 8:23 Ozzie Albies 9:15 Drake Baldwin 10:22 Oli Marmol 11:28 CJ Abrams
Subscribe to the podcast! https://apple.co/3KWKFNo https://open.spotify.com/show/4NCHAElLW0pR2sclRnqj0V
Follow all our social media channels for more content! https://twitter.com/FoulTerritoryTV https://www.instagram.com/foulterritoryshow/ https://www.tiktok.com/@foulterritory https://www.facebook.com/FoulTerritoryShow
entry.content:
Alanna Rizzo and Tricia Whitaker catch up with some of baseball's biggest stars from the MLB All-Star Game red carpet in Philadelphia! Paul Skenes, Livvy Dunne, Munetaka Murakami, Bryce Harper, Juan Soto, Dave Roberts, Freddie Freeman, Max Muncy, Ozzie Albies, Drake Baldwin, Oli Marmol and CJ Abrams stop by to discuss All-Star Week, the Home Run Derby, memorable moments from the first half, and what they're looking forward to during the Midsummer Classic.

entry.title: Ken Rosenthal On The New Derby Format, Mike Trout In Philly & Trade Deadline Outlook
entry.summary:
FT Senior Insider Ken Rosenthal joins A.J. Pierzynski, Erik Kratz and Scott Braun live from Philadelphia during MLB All-Star Week! Ken breaks down the new Home Run Derby format, explains why Philadelphia is the ideal host for the All-Star Game, and discusses what kind of reception Mike Trout could receive from the hometown crowd. Plus, he shares the latest trade deadline buzz surrounding the Tigers, Red Sox, Orioles and Yankees, and weighs in on Aaron Judge's injury.
Use our code for 10% off your next order of MLB tickets on SeatGeek*: https://seatgeek.onelink.me/RrnK/TERRITORY10 Sponsored by SeatGeek. *Restrictions apply. Max $20 discount​

entry.content:
FT Senior Insider Ken Rosenthal joins A.J. Pierzynski, Erik Kratz and Scott Braun live from Philadelphia during MLB All-Star Week! Ken breaks down the new Home Run Derby format, explains why Philadelphia is the ideal host for the All-Star Game, and discusses what kind of reception Mike Trout could receive from the hometown crowd. Plus, he shares the latest trade deadline buzz surrounding the Tigers, Red Sox, Orioles and Yankees, and weighs in on Aaron Judge's injury.
